children.name: description
children.label: Description
children.default: Align every AWS decision to C-suite metrics from the start. We prioritize business outcomes first, then hold architecture accountable.

children.name: description
children.label: Description
children.default: New capabilities go live and generate returns within the engagement timeline

default.title: Outcomes First
default.description: Align every AWS decision to C-suite metrics from the start. We prioritize business outcomes first, then hold architecture accountable.

proof_points.title: Revenue
proof_points.description: New capabilities go live and generate returns within the engagement timeline

proof_points.title: Cost
proof_points.description: Up to 25–35% AWS spend reduction is built into the architecture from day one, not recovered post-migration.

proof_points.title: Risk
proof_points.description: Regulatory and security outcomes are defined before provisioning, so go-live carries no compliance surprises.

default.title: Well-Architected Always
default.content_subtitle: Compliance built into every workload from day one
default.description: As an AWS Well-Architected Program Partner, we design for consistent compliance outcomes. Every engagement is structured to meet audit expectations, with no surprises at go-live.

proof_points.title: Zero compliance findings
proof_points.description: Zero audit findings achieved through embedded well-architected reviews, WARs at every phase

proof_points.title: Risk prioritized by business impact
proof_points.description: Prioritized by business impact, aligned to leadership priorities.

proof_points.title: Continuous governance
proof_points.description: Continuous reviews built into operations, not a one-time act

default.title: Intelligent Integration
default.content_subtitle: Bringing AWS, Evoq building blocks, data and processes into one connected flow
default.description: We design AWS as the core that connects your systems. EVOQ building blocks enable insights, data intelligence, research, and automation, tailored to your industry: underwriting, CX, supply chain, and more.

proof_points.title: Event-driven architecture
proof_points.description: Decoupled services that scale and integrate reliably at any volume

proof_points.title: Hybrid connectivity
proof_points.description: Proven patterns bridging on-premises estates with AWS, without disrupting what works

proof_points.title: Data mesh and intelligence
proof_points.description: Governed, domain-based data foundation with built-in intelligence for insights and analytics

default.evoq_heading: EVOQ Integration Toolkit: From connected intelligence to business impact.

default.title: Governed by Default
default.content_subtitle: Security and compliance built in from the start, proven in regulated industries
default.description: Security is part of the operating model. Designed for organizations with strict regulatory and governance standards. Proven across financial services, insurance, and healthcare, with governance active from day one.

proof_points.title: Zero-Trust foundations
proof_points.description: Least-privilege access, service controls, and network segmentation built in.

proof_points.title: Compliance automation
proof_points.description: Standards mapped and tracked continuously, with leadership approval at each phase.

proof_points.title: Audit-ready posture
proof_points.description: Continuous evidence collection makes audits smooth and predictable.

default.title: AI-Accelerated Delivery
default.tab_subtitle: Powered by EVOQ and AWS AI tools
default.content_subtitle: EVOQ orchestration, AWS AI tools, and proven accelerators
default.description: EVOQ coordinates delivery across discovery, build, and run - drawing on continuous R&D and real client patterns. With Bedrock AgentCore, Amazon Q, and AWS Transform, it turns accumulated delivery knowledge into a repeatable acceleration engine

proof_points.title: Discovery to design
proof_points.description: Migration patterns shaped by prior work reduce scoping effort by up to 60%

proof_points.title: Build and test
proof_points.description: Amazon Q and Bedrock-powered code review, with EVOQ accelerators refined continuously through R&D and client delivery

proof_points.title: Run and optimize
proof_points.description: EVOQ agentic operations on Bedrock AgentCore detects, diagnoses, and remediates autonomously, using guardrails proven across client engagements

default.evoq_heading: Evoq in Action: Turning delivery knowledge into a repeatable acceleration engine.
